race.description: Douglass Blinds & Security Screens Mdn Hcp
race.comment: COOL AZA BREEZE (4) was solid in her latest trial at Wyong and has found a suitable race on debut. Latham's booking is a positive sign and he has options from the barrier. Spent a while off the scene, but she appears a mature commodity now and a forward showing is expected. THE DIPLOMAT (7) will find this much easier after tackling a good race at Canterbury on debut, ending up 3.2L away. This is a much easier assignment and he can be prominent from the outset. NUNS CHORUS (3) was superb late at Gosford first-up and is not to be discounted dropping to country level. MARIANA MISS (8) resumes here with the blinkers on for the first time. Trials have been good and she can put her best foot forward.
